name: /compliance-remove: rejects (exit 2) when the supplied id is not present in the catalog
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://nist.gov
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us-government
  applicable_to: [ai]
  identifier_scheme: nist
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" definitely-not-an-id --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml"
